AI_OVERGROWTH_EVENT.title: Overgrowth Draft
AI_OVERGROWTH_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descri:
A page of notes hangs from a vine, its corners still wet with sap.

The sentences are nearly finished. Only the choice remains.
AI_OVERGROWTH_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.option: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random upgradable card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AI_OVERGROWTH_EVENT.pages.OPTION_A_RESUL: You let the draft stand. Warmth and coin follow naturally.
AI_OVERGROWTH_EVENT.pages.OPTION_B_RESUL: You cut away the weak lines. One card in your deck improves.
AI_HIVE_EVENT.title: Hive Draft
AI_HIVE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.description:
A sheet of wax-paper has been tucked into the comb, covered in tiny, precise revisions.

The swarm pauses, as if waiting for your answer.
AI_HIVE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.options.OPTI: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random upgradable card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AI_HIVE_EVENT.pages.OPTION_A_RESULT.desc: The hive approves with a low hum, and the bargain is honored.
AI_HIVE_EVENT.pages.OPTION_B_RESULT.desc: Your correction sharpens the pattern. Something in your deck sharpens with it.
AI_GLORY_EVENT.title: Glory Draft
AI_GLORY_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.description:
A polished tablet reflects your face and a cleaner version beside it.

An unfinished script gleams across the surface.
AI_GLORY_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.options.OPT: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random upgradable card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AI_GLORY_EVENT.pages.OPTION_A_RESULT.des: You accept the polished lie and are rewarded for it.
AI_GLORY_EVENT.pages.OPTION_B_RESULT.des: You inscribe your own improvement over the shining text. Your deck remembers.
AI_UNDERDOCKS_EVENT.title: Underdocks Draft
AI_UNDERDOCKS_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descri:
A damp ledger floats beside the pier, open to an entry that was never settled.

The page smells of salt, mold, and unfinished business.
AI_UNDERDOCKS_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.option: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random upgradable card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AI_UNDERDOCKS_EVENT.pages.OPTION_A_RESUL: You close the account in the easiest way possible. The page pays out.
AI_UNDERDOCKS_EVENT.pages.OPTION_B_RESUL: You rewrite the old debt into something useful. One card changes with the ink.
AI_SHARED_EVENT.title: Shared Draft
AI_SHARED_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descriptio:
A familiar page drifts down from nowhere at all.

Somehow, the Spire expects an answer from anyone willing to give one.
AI_SHARED_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.options.OP: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random upgradable card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AI_SHARED_EVENT.pages.OPTION_A_RESULT.de: You let the text remain as it was and take the simple reward.
AI_SHARED_EVENT.pages.OPTION_B_RESULT.de: You leave behind a stronger version than the one you found.
